name: MegaIX Europe Route Servers
irr_as_set: AS-ECIX-BER AS-ECIX-DUS AS-ECIX-FRA AS-ECIX-HAM AS-ECIX-MUC AS9033:AS-MEGAPORT-RS-DUB
notes:
We run multiple independent IXPs. This ASN is used for our Europe Route Servers (Excluding Sofia)

AS-MACROS:
- Berlin = AS-ECIX-BER
- Dusseldorf = AS-ECIX-DUS
- Frankfurt = AS-ECIX-FRA
- Hamburg = AS-ECIX-HAM
- Munich = AS-ECIX-MUC
- Dublin = AS9033:AS-MEGAPORT-RS-DUB

= Communities accepted from peering members =

For a list of the BGP communities accepted and sent by our route servers please visit: https://docs.megaport.com/ix/communities/
